name: appstore-mcp
description: Manage the Apple App Store Connect API from Claude: apps, in-app purchases, subscriptions, pricing, App Review submission, TestFlight, provisioning, analytics, and more (113 tools).
long_description: A Rust MCP server exposing the Apple App Store Connect API. Curated tools for apps & metadata, in-app purchases, subscriptions and their offers, pricing & availability, App Store versions, App Review submission, TestFlight, provisioning & signing, asset uploads, promoted purchases, customer reviews, phased release, users, in-app events, Xcode Cloud, and analytics reports, plus two generic JSON:API tools that reach any other endpoint. Authenticates with a short-lived ES256 JWT from your App Store Connect API key.

asc_issuer_id.title: Issuer ID
asc_issuer_id.description: Your App Store Connect issuer UUID (Users and Access -> Integrations -> App Store Connect API).

asc_private_key_path.title: Private key (.p8)
asc_private_key_path.description: The AuthKey_XXXXXX.p8 file you downloaded when creating the API key.
